creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
nox         2012-04-06 16:07:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/mutt-devel      Makefile 
    security/vuxml       vuln.xml 
  Added files:
    mail/mutt-devel/files patch-gnutls-CN-validation patch-nbsp 
  Log:
  - Fix vulnerability CVE-2011-1429.
  - Add a patch to the mutt pager that handles non-breaking space
    characters (0xA0) in an UTF8 environment correctly.
  - Bump PORTREVISION.
  
  PR:             ports/166659
  Submitted by:   Udo Schweigert <udo.schweigert@siemens.com> (maintainer)
  Security:       http://www.freebsd.org/ports/portaudit/49314321-7fd4-11e1-9582-001b2134ef46.html
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.326     +1 -1      ports/mail/mutt-devel/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/mail/mutt-devel/files/patch-gnutls-CN-validation (new)
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/mail/mutt-devel/files/patch-nbsp (new)
  1.2654    +31 -1     ports/security/vuxml/vuln.xml
